vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về thực vật
vocab.example: Growing sunflowers as a child really piqued my botanical curiosity regarding how plants follow the sun.
I remember the excitement of seeing the first tender shoots of mung beans peeking through the cotton wool.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động theo đuổi nghề làm vườn
vocab.example: My early horticultural pursuits were limited to a small patch of soil in our backyard where I planted radishes.

vocab.meaning: phát triển mạnh mẽ dưới sự chăm sóc
vocab.example: It was immensely rewarding to see the roses thrive under my care after I learned how to water them properly.
My teacher used our classroom plants to explain the complex concept of photosynthesis to us.
I was fascinated by the thick, succulent leaves of the jade plant my grandmother gave me when I was ten.
We had a small wooden crate on the balcony dedicated to aromatic herbs like basil and mint.
I used to wait impatiently for the seasonal bloom of the jasmine bush near my bedroom window.
My grandfather taught me that using nutrient-rich soil was the secret to growing such oversized pumpkins.
The delicate floral fragrance of the lilies I grew remains one of my most cherished childhood memories.
